chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 26 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25 2. For orders on CMA No.107/2024 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.108/2024 01.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the applicant Mr. Salman Afzal, Collector of Customs Exports Port Qasim Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of applicant, same is taken on record. Pursuant to order dated 24.11.2025, under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference application which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
